options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: goal
options.description:
Lets the user choose the completion goal
Defeat Zarok - Beat the boss at the end
Chalices - Collect all chalices
Both - Defeat both zarok AND get the chalices

options.name: progression_option
options.description:
Lets users choose how they wish to progress
Vanilla - Plays the game like normal
Open - Unlocks the whole map to go in any order

options.name: include_ant_hill_in_checks
options.description: Toggle whether to include the ant hill in your location checks and logic

options.name: include_chalices_in_checks
options.description: Include Chalices in Checks

options.name: chalice_win_count
options.description: Sets the number of chalices required to complete the game

options.name: break_ammo_limit
options.description: Allow weapon ammo to be higher than the default

options.name: break_percentage_limit
options.description: Allow weapon percentages to be higher than the default

options.name: traps
options.description: Allow traps in the pool

options.name: ammo
options.display_name: Ammo and Charge in Item Pool
options.description: Allow Ammo and Charge in the pool

options.name: deathlink
options.description: Sets if you want deathlink or not

options.name: deathsound
options.description: There is a sound that will play moments before your death with this on.

options.name: cheat_menu
options.description:
Sets the cheat menu to be available in the pause menu. This allows level skip, chalice completion and
invulnerability. Please note, though. That the chalices are counted via checks as getting the actual number isn't
viable at the moment. Sorry!

options.name: gargoylesanity
options.description: Sets whether to do checks for interacting with gargoyle statues

options.name: booksanity
options.description: Sets whether reading books counts as checks

options.name: runesanity
options.description: Sets whether to mix runes into the pool

options.name: guaranteed_items
options.description: Guarantees that the specified items will be in the item pool
options: Life Bottle: Hall of Heroes (Canny Tim)
Life Bottle: Dan's Crypt - Behind Wall
